column41: Jul 10: The Giants placed Bericoto on the 10-day injured list Friday with a left oblique strain.

Jul 10: Manager A.J. Hinch said Friday that Eduardo Valencia will start at catcher Saturday against the Phillies, and it's uncertain if Dingler (thumb) will play in Sunday's series finale, Evan Woodbery of MLive.com reports.
